evals.prompt: Generate 50k realistic e-commerce orders with Zipf-distributed product popularity and seasonal revenue patterns
evals.expected_output: PySpark script using spark.range, Faker UDFs, Zipf distribution for products, seasonal timestamp generation

assertions.text: Uses spark.range not manual row creation
Product selection uses Zipf or power-law distribution
Timestamps show seasonal patterns (not uniform random)

evals.prompt: Create a customer dimension table with 10k rows and realistic demographics
evals.expected_output: PySpark with Faker for names, addresses, emails; realistic age/income distributions

assertions.text: Uses Faker for name, address, email generation
Age or income uses non-uniform distribution (log-normal, normal, etc.)
Includes referential integrity if related tables exist
